brief_nursing_elaboration: Joint inflammation causing pain, swelling, and reduced ROM. Nursing: pain management, mobility support, joint protection education, medication adherence monitoring.
Stomach lining inflammation from acid/H. pylori/NSAIDs. Nursing: dietary modification, antiulcer medication admin, pain assessment, H. pylori testing coordination.
Liver inflammation from viral/autoimmune/toxic causes. Nursing: LFT monitoring, jaundice assessment, infection control, nutritional support, fatigue management.
Kidney inflammation affecting filtration/fluid balance. Nursing: fluid intake/output monitoring, urinalysis assessment, BP management, dietary modification.
Nasal sinus inflammation from infection/allergies. Nursing: nasal irrigation, decongestant admin, headache/facial pain comfort, antibiotic efficacy.
Corneal inflammation/infection causing eye pain. Nursing: ophthalmic medication application, eye patching, photophobia management, vision protection.
Tongue inflammation from nutritional deficiency/infection. Nursing: nutritional supplementation, oral hygiene, eating difficulty assessment, B12 evaluation.
Inability to move muscles from stroke/SCI/neuropathy. Nursing: ROM exercises, positioning, contracture prevention, assistive device training, psychological support.
Normal cell death mechanisms altered in cancer/aging. Nursing: chemotherapy coordination, cell count monitoring, side effect management, prognosis discussion.
Speech/swallow impairment from stroke/neurological disease. Nursing: swallow assessment, dietary modification, speech therapy coordination, aspiration precautions.
RBCs in urine from UTI/stones/cancer. Nursing: urinalysis RBC count, imaging coordination, hydration encouragement, gross vs microscopic assessment.
Pulmonary consolidation from bacterial/viral/fungal infection. Nursing: respiratory assessment, O2 sat monitoring, sputum specimen collection, antibiotic efficacy.
Vessel/tissue hardening from arteriosclerosis/MS. Nursing: mobility assessment, spasticity management, disease progression monitoring, adaptive equipment training.
Cell death from ischemia/infection/trauma. Nursing: debridement support, wound care, perfusion optimization, infection prevention, pain management.
Scar tissue proliferation from chronic inflammation. Nursing: mobility maintenance, physical therapy, respiratory assessment if pulmonary.
Shortness of breath from cardiac/pulmonary/metabolic causes. Nursing: O2 therapy, positioning, respiratory rate assessment, anxiety management.
Vessel narrowing from atherosclerosis/scar tissue. Nursing: cardiac output assessment, stent placement support, medication efficacy, lifestyle modification.
Traveling clot/air/fat causing vessel obstruction. Nursing: O2 therapy, anticoagulation, thrombolytic readiness, respiratory/neurological monitoring.

literal_translation: Artery wall outpouching with rupture risk
brief_nursing_elaboration: Weakened vessel wall dilation risking rupture. Nursing: BP control, rupture precautions, surgery readiness, family screening education.
Pleural membrane inflammation from infection/infarction. Nursing: chest pain assessment, splinting support, NSAIDs, underlying cause investigation.
Blue skin/mucous membranes from hypoxemia. Nursing: O2 saturation monitoring, supplemental O2 admin, respiratory assessment, position optimization.
Muscle tissue inflammation causing pain/weakness. Nursing: rest/activity balance, pain control, physical therapy coordination, CK/myoglobin monitoring.
Nerve inflammation causing neuropathy/pain. Nursing: pain management, nerve block coordination, physical therapy, sensory/motor assessment.
Breast tissue inflammation from infection/lactation. Nursing: antibiotic admin, hot/cold compress application, lactation support, pain relief.
Fluid-filled sac inflammation near joints. Nursing: rest/ice application, anti-inflammatory admin, ROM exercises coordination, pain assessment.
Bladder infection/inflammation. Nursing: urinalysis monitoring, dysuria relief, fluid intake encouragement, catheter care if applicable.
Heart tissue inflammation (myocardium/pericardium/endocardium). Nursing: vital sign monitoring, arrhythmia assessment, cardiac medication administration, activity restrictions.
Benign/malignant tumor from uncontrolled cell proliferation. Nursing: diagnostic test coordination, biopsy support, treatment option discussion, psychological support.
Persistent sleep initiation/maintenance difficulty. Nursing: sleep hygiene education, relaxation techniques, medication review, hypnotic consideration.
Uncontrolled shaking from Parkinson's/anxiety/cold. Nursing: safety precautions, medication review, tremor-rest vs action assessment, ADL adaptation.
Memory loss from TBI/dementia/dissociation. Nursing: orientation aids, safe environment, memory assistance, cognitive rehabilitation coordination.
Complete language loss/comprehension deficit from CVA. Nursing: communication alternatives, speech pathology referral, frustration management, family education.
Jaundice from bilirubin elevation (hepatic/biliary/hemolytic). Nursing: LFT monitoring, bilirubin trending, pruritus relief, phototherapy if applicable.
Pale skin from anemia/shock/poor perfusion. Nursing: CBC assessment, perfusion check, hemoglobin monitoring, underlying cause investigation.
Fever >38.5°C from infection/malignancy. Nursing: antipyretic admin, cool compress application, fluid hydration, culture coordination, hypothermia precautions.
Insufficient RBCs/hemoglobin reducing oxygen capacity. Nursing: fatigue assessment, dietary iron counseling, transfusion coordination, dyspnea monitoring.
Abnormal fluid in interstitial spaces from CHF/renal/liver disease. Nursing: weight daily, pitting scale assessment, elevate extremities, diuretic admin.
Temporary breathing cessation (sleep apnea/central apnea). Nursing: pulse oximetry monitoring, CPAP compliance, arousal assessment, sleep positioning education.
Ear canal or middle ear inflammation causing otalgia. Nursing: pain relief, antibiotic/antifungal drops, hearing assessment post-infection.
Eye iris inflammation. Nursing: photophobia management, ophthalmic drop administration, vision assessment, pain control, photochromic glasses.
Facial/body redness from fever/medications/embarrassment. Nursing: temperature assessment, medication side effect evaluation, anxiety management.
Peritoneal effusion from cirrhosis/malignancy. Nursing: abdominal girth tracking, paracentesis coordination, albumin replacement, sodium restriction education.
Intravascular clot causing vessel occlusion. Nursing: anticoagulation monitoring, limb assessment, thrombolytic/surgical intervention, DVT precautions.

literal_translation: Decrease in organ/tissue size from lack of nourishment
brief_nursing_elaboration: Muscle/tissue wasting from disuse/denervation/malnutrition. Nursing: ROM exercises, nutritional support, physical therapy, mobility encouragement.
TOF with VSD/pulmonary stenosis/RVH/ASD. Nursing: exercise tolerance, hypercyanotic spell precautions, cardiac catheterization readiness, surgical planning.
Allergic/contact skin inflammation. Nursing: allergen identification, topical treatment application, skin integrity assessment, pruritus management.
Voice box inflammation. Nursing: voice rest support, throat lozenges/sprays, hydration, hoarseness assessment, airway monitoring.
Gum inflammation from plaque/infection. Nursing: oral hygiene education, antimicrobial rinse recommendation, bleeding gums assessment, dental referral.
Tonsil infection/inflammation. Nursing: throat swabs, throat culture collection, antipyretic admin, throat comfort measures, swallowing difficulty.
Airway inflammation with productive cough. Nursing: airway clearance support, hydration optimization, cough suppressant admin, respiratory assessment.
Cervical inflammation from STI/infection. Nursing: STI screening coordination, discharge assessment, sexual health education, antibiotic admin.
Ureter inflammation from infection/stones. Nursing: hydration optimization, urinalysis monitoring, analgesic admin, stone passage assessment.
Glucose excretion indicating hyperglycemia/diabetes. Nursing: blood glucose monitoring, urinalysis serial, diabetes education, medication review.
Heart rate >100 bpm from stress/infection/cardiac disease. Nursing: ECG monitoring, anxiety assessment, fluid status evaluation, medication review.
Heart rate <60 bpm from cardiac/neurological causes. Nursing: pacemaker readiness, dizziness assessment, ECG monitoring, medication adjustment.
Intrathoracic bleeding from trauma/surgery. Nursing: chest tube management, transfusion readiness, vital sign monitoring, breath sound assessment.
Secondary cancer growth beyond primary site. Nursing: staging assessment, palliative/curative treatment, pain management, emotional/spiritual support.
Intravascular clot from endothelial damage/stasis. Nursing: anticoagulation therapy, leg assessment, DVT/PE precautions, activity tolerance monitoring.
Swallowing difficulty from stroke/esophageal pathology. Nursing: diet texture modification, feeding tube coordination, aspiration precaution, swallow study orders.
Throat inflammation from viral/bacterial infection. Nursing: throat culture coordination, antibiotic admin, analgesic provision, swallowing assessment.
Prostate gland inflammation. Nursing: urinary symptom assessment, antibiotic efficacy monitoring, pain management, PSA testing coordination.
BP <90/60 mmHg causing decreased perfusion. Nursing: orthostatic assessment, IV fluid administration, fall prevention, shock precautions.
Profuse sweating from fever/anxiety/cardiac event. Nursing: temperature monitoring, linen changes, dehydration assessment, underlying cause evaluation.
Elevated WBC indicating infection/leukemia. Nursing: infection precautions, CBC trending, fever management, underlying cause investigation.
Albuminuria from kidney disease/pregnancy. Nursing: urinalysis 24-hr collection, renal function assessment, BP monitoring, dietary protein evaluation.
Core temp <35°C from exposure/shock. Nursing: gradual rewarming, ECG monitoring for J-waves, fluid avoidance, atrial fib precautions.
Excessive daytime somnolence from narcolepsy/sleep apnea. Nursing: sleep study coordination, stimulant medication admin, safety precautions, driving evaluation.
Tissue overgrowth (muscle/prostate/heart). Nursing: functional assessment, medication efficacy monitoring, symptom management, surgical intervention readiness.
Pleural effusion from CHF/cirrhosis. Nursing: thoracentesis support, breath sound monitoring, diuretic efficacy, underlying cause treatment.

prefix_meaning: Named after Bartolomeo Eustachi - auditory tube
brief_nursing_elaboration: Auditory tube inflammation affecting pressure regulation. Nursing: otalgia relief, nasal decongestant admin, hearing assessment, ear fullness evaluation.
Myocardial inflammation from viral/autoimmune. Nursing: cardiac enzyme monitoring, arrhythmia detection, activity restriction, heart failure precautions.
Pancreatic inflammation from alcohol/gallstones. Nursing: NPO status, pain management, lipase monitoring, insulin/enzyme supplementation, fluid management.
Brain inflammation from viral/bacterial infection. Nursing: neurological assessment q2-4h, fever management, seizure precautions, neuro imaging coordination.

literal_translation: Inflammation of the heart's outer layer
brief_nursing_elaboration: Pericardium inflammation causing chest pain/effusion. Nursing: chest pain assessment, pericardiocentesis support, cardiac monitoring, activity restriction.

literal_translation: Inflammation of the heart's inner layer
brief_nursing_elaboration: Endocardium infection (bacterial). Nursing: blood culture coordination, IV antibiotic admin, fever management, cardiac monitoring, sepsis precautions.
Heart chamber dilation from CHF/cardiomyopathy. Nursing: cardiac output monitoring, dyspnea assessment, diuretic admin, fluid restriction education.
Liver enlargement from cirrhosis/infection. Nursing: palpation assessment, abdominal girth monitoring, LFT assessment, fluid retention evaluation.
Spleen enlargement from infection/hemolysis. Nursing: abdominal palpation precaution, trauma prevention, CBC monitoring, left-sided pain assessment.
Kidney enlargement from hydronephrosis/polycystic disease. Nursing: renal function monitoring, back pain assessment, urinary obstruction evaluation.
Elevated BP >140/90 mmHg. Nursing: BP monitoring, antihypertensive efficacy, lifestyle modification education, target organ damage assessment.
Spontaneous/traumatic lung collapse from air entry. Nursing: O2 therapy, chest tube insertion support, breathing comfort, anxiety management.

root_2_meaning: Greek: syn = together + ova = egg (synovial fluid)
brief_nursing_elaboration: Tendon sheath inflammation from repetitive use/infection. Nursing: immobilization support, anti-inflammatory meds, ROM exercises coordination.
Low platelet count increasing bleeding risk. Nursing: bleeding precautions, platelet transfusion coordination, petechiae assessment, stool guaiac monitoring.
